text.title: Preference-Trained Router Worked Example
text.summary: One RouteLLM-style deployment for Haiku vs Opus.

example.note: 4000 jury-labeled prompts; small-BERT classifier; calibration target strong-acc - 5%; uncertainty band 0.1; fallback opus.
example.code: # pseudo: at inference time p_strong = router.predict_proba(prompt)[1] if p_strong - (1 - p_strong) < 0.1: # r4 uncertainty fallback model = "opus" else: model = "opus" if p_strong > threshold else "haiku" response = client.complete(model, prompt)

example.note: Bad — single-judge labels (r2) AND no uncertainty band (r4). Routes hard prompts to haiku silently.
